temporal_loop.name: Temporal Loop
temporal_loop.description: Time begins to repeat in 3-minute cycles, with subtle changes each iteration.

gravity_shift.name: Gravity Anomaly
gravity_shift.description: Gravity becomes inconsistent, with objects and furniture floating or stuck to walls.

memory_bleed.name: Memory Bleed
memory_bleed.description: Memories from different times and places begin manifesting as physical objects.

reality_tear.name: Reality Tear
reality_tear.description: A visible crack in space reveals glimpses of other dimensions or timelines.

echo_chamber.name: Echo Chamber
echo_chamber.description: Sounds from the past and future overlap with the present, creating an auditory chaos.

shadow_displacement.name: Shadow Displacement
shadow_displacement.description: Shadows move independently of their sources, sometimes revealing hidden truths.

memory_vault.destination_type: A space where lost memories float like golden orbs

shadow_realm.destination_type: A dark mirror of reality where fears take physical form

temporal_nexus.destination_type: A junction point where all timelines converge

emotional_landscape.destination_type: A world shaped by pure emotion and feeling

forgotten_archive.destination_type: A library containing every thought never spoken

parallel_self.destination_type: A place where you can meet versions of yourself from other choices

childhood_echo.destination_type: A recreation of your childhood home, but wrong in subtle ways

final_moment.destination_type: The last second before everything changed forever
